description: Evaluation set for the AI SRE multi-agent pipeline. Each incident has an expected outcome. 'decision' is RECOMMEND_REMEDIATION or ESCALATE (ESCALATE accepts ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN or INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE). 'rootCauseKeywords' must ALL appear (case-insensitive) in the root-cause statement or postmortem. 'citationAnyOf' passes if ANY listed source name is cited. The eval is scored honestly against whatever Foundry IQ actually returns: incidents whose knowledge is not indexed are EXPECTED to ground poorly.

incidents.name: order-service NPE — classic loyalty-tier (headline scenario 1)
incidents.stackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.toUpperCase()" because "loyaltyTier" is null
  at com.shop.order.OrderService.applyLoyaltyDiscount(OrderService.java:42)
  at com.shop.order.OrderService.processOrder(OrderService.java:27)

incidents.name: order-service NPE — terse one-line report
incidents.stackTrace: Orders failing with HTTP 500. java.lang.NullPointerException at OrderService.java:42

incidents.name: order-service NPE — reported from the controller frame
incidents.stackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException
  at com.shop.order.OrderController.createOrder(OrderController.java:31)
Some customers cannot place orders since this morning's deploy.

incidents.name: order-service NPE — phrased as a customer-impact ticket
incidents.stackTrace: Support escalation: ~1 in 5 checkout attempts return 'internal error'. Logs mention NullPointerException in the order service loyalty discount step.

incidents.name: payment-service timeouts — the MISLEADING incident (headline scenario 2, retry demo)
incidents.stackTrace:
java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out
  at com.shop.payment.BankGatewayClient.charge(BankGatewayClient.java:31)
  at com.shop.payment.PaymentService.process(PaymentService.java:54)
Payments to bank-gateway are timing out. Suspect bank-gateway outage.

incidents.name: payment-service timeouts — pool wait warning quoted
incidents.stackTrace: Payment failures spiking. Logs show 'Connection acquire wait p95=14800ms (active=5 max=5)' and SocketTimeoutException from BankGatewayClient.

incidents.name: payment-service timeouts — vague 5xx report after deploy
incidents.stackTrace: 5xx rate on /api/payments jumped from ~0% to >20% shortly after this morning's deploy. Intermittent read timeouts in logs.

incidents.name: payment-service timeouts — on-call blames the gateway team
incidents.stackTrace:
Paging bank-gateway on-call: our payment-service gets SocketTimeoutException calling you since ~09:05. Please check your service.
  at com.shop.payment.BankGatewayClient.charge(BankGatewayClient.java:31)

incidents.name: checkout-service — UNKNOWN service, no observability data (SHOULD ESCALATE)
incidents.stackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException
  at com.shop.checkout.CartService.applyPromo(CartService.java:88)
Customers report empty-cart errors.

incidents.name: order-service OutOfMemoryError — contradicts the observability data (SHOULD ESCALATE)
incidents.stackTrace:
